# setDelegate(_:)

**Instance Method**

Sets the composition picker view delegate.

## Declaration

```swift
func setDelegate(_ delegate: Any!)
```

## Parameters

- **delegate**: The delegate to set.

## Setting and Retrieving the View Delegate

- **delegate()**: Retrieves the composition picker view delegate.
